Featured Project
Live at mithra-lifeos.com
Mithra Life OS
AI-Powered Productivity · Zero-Trust · Multiplayer

A full-stack productivity platform engineered with a zero-trust backend. Tasks, habits, Pomodoro sessions, mood logging, and AI-powered journaling — all in one dashboard. Semantic search converts journals into 768-dimensional embeddings using Google Gemini, enabling natural language queries over personal data. The Blend feature creates real-time multiplayer accountability workspaces with join codes.

React FastAPI Python Supabase PostgreSQL Google Gemini pgvector Row-Level Security
→ Live Demo GitHub
🔐
Zero-Trust Architecture
Row-Level Security enforced at the PostgreSQL level — not the application layer. Even direct Supabase API calls cannot read another user's data.
Security
🧠
AI Semantic Journal Search
768-dimensional Gemini embeddings stored in pgvector. Cosine similarity retrieval finds semantically related journal entries — understands meaning, not just keywords.
Vector Embeddings · RAG
🔗
Multiplayer Blend Workspaces
Collaborative accountability rooms via 6-character join codes. RLS policies handle selective cross-user data access securely.
Multiplayer
⚡
Full Productivity Suite
Task lists, habit streaks, Pomodoro sessions, daily mood logging — one dashboard. Eliminates tool fragmentation for high-achievers.
Product
